title: Trump administration to force foreigners in the U.S. to apply for a green card abroad
description: Foreigners in the U.S. who want a green card will need to leave and apply in their home country, the Trump administration announced Friday, in a surprise change to a longstanding policy.

title: Rubio arrives in India ahead of Quad talks as U.S. tries to reset strained ties
description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrived in India on Saturday ahead of a meeting next week with his counterparts from India, Australia, and Japan, members of the Indo-Pacific strategic alliance.

title: Judge drops criminal case against Kilmar Abrego García, deeming it vindictive
description: The Maryland man was charged with human smuggling after a high-profile legal fight in which courts ruled he had been illegally deported to El Salvador.

title: What else happened under Trump this week
description: There’s a lot to keep track of.

title: Poll shows voter confidence in economy plummeting to a nearly 4-year low
description: Concerns about rising costs are a problem for Republicans ahead of the midterm elections as Trump struggles to deliver on affordability pledges.

title: Trump's week in Washington marked by wins at the ballot box and headaches on the Hill
description: President Trump's week included high highs, with major election wins in his test of Republican loyalty, and low lows as he attacked Congressional allies and faced legislative defeat.

title: DHS says ICE has 'no relationship' with spyware maker Paragon Solutions
description: The Department of Homeland Security says ICE has no current contract or relationship with the company, but questions remain about ICE's use of commercial spyware.

title: Pressure from Silicon Valley helped block Trump’s expected order on AI
description: Industry leaders warned in last-minute calls to the president that the proposed safety vetting system could inhibit development of the pivotal technology.

title: Texas runoff roiled by shadowy spending and a call to imprison ‘American Zionists’
description: Incendiary comments by a House candidate in Texas prompted condemnation from her fellow Democrats, who accused Republicans of propping her up.

title: GOP senators delay immigration funding. And, what to expect this hurricane season
description: Congressional Republicans left for recess without passing Trump's top immigration enforcement package. And, forecasters are predicting fewer storms than average for the 2026 hurricane season.

title: Congress delays vote on Republican-backed ICE funding after GOP infighting
description: Republicans upended plans to pass a partisan bill to fund ICE after party infighting over unrelated issues snarled their progress.

title: Jeff Flake, former Republican senator, on party pushing back against Trump's agenda
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Jeff Flake, a former Republican senator, about this week's GOP pushback against some of President Trump's priorities.

title: 'We'll never know if he could have been saved.' The gaps in Trump's rural health fund
description: Republicans promise that $50 billion in new health funding will help rural America. But it's not expected to aid the years-long effort in North Carolina's Martin County to reopen its only hospital.

title: As voters prioritize cost of living, focus on abortion evolves in midterm elections
description: There's been a shift in attention in the party ahead of the midterms as voters rank affordability the top issue. That raises questions about what an evolving message on reproductive rights looks like.

title: Takeaways from the DNC's 'autopsy' of the 2024 presidential election
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with political strategist and Clinton White House counselor Paul Begala about the DNC's "autopsy" dissecting its defeat in the 2024 presidential election.

title: What happened under Trump this week
description: It was a busy one.

title: Trump to ease rule on climate super pollutants, says move will cut costs
description: Industry trade groups reject the administration's claims, saying the rollback of the Biden-era regulations would actually drive up prices.

title: U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show
description: Amid hostilities with Iran, the American military expended far more advanced interceptors to protect Israel than Israeli forces did, according to Defense Department data.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: Supreme Court dismisses death penalty case on people with mental disabilities
description: The majority dismissed on procedural grounds the case of Joseph Clifton Smith, whose mental faculties skirt the threshold for being spared the death penalty.
